author: Red Cogs
install_msg: Thanks for installing Reminders! Set your first reminder with `[p]remind 2h Check the oven`.
name: Reminders
short: Personal reminders with flexible time parsing
description: Set personal reminders that DM you or ping you in a channel. Supports relative times (2h, 30m), absolute times (14:00), specific dates, and recurring reminders (daily, weekly, monthly).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores reminder content, target times, and channel/guild IDs per user. No personal data is shared with third parties.
